utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: includes both physical and mental health insurance with named plans and explicit monthly costs and a summed total; fully specified with costs. 2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with plan name and monthly cost and a total; fully specified with costs. 3) travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance with plan name and monthly cost and a total; fully specified with costs. 4) additional_services: lists an enhancement service (adventure coverage) with a monthly cost and total; fully specified with costs. 5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual totals and extra comparative info; fully specified with complete cost breakdown. All 5 required items are present and include the necessary details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each plan name in the final coverage plan, then match to the exact corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for home contents, LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel insurance, and Adventure Travel Coverage as an add-on. From the ground-truth: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Coverage (home content) rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel insurance) rating 9; Adventure Travel Coverage rating 10.
